projects.name: LocalLink

policies.content:
# Privacy Policy – LocalLink

**Last Updated:** May 2026

## Introduction

LocalLink is a privacy-first hyperlocal social networking application designed to help users connect with nearby communities in real time while maintaining temporary and privacy-focused interactions.

This Privacy Policy explains how LocalLink collects, uses, stores, and protects user information.

By using LocalLink, you agree to the practices described in this policy.

---

# Information We Collect

## 1. Location Information

LocalLink uses device location data to:

* Discover nearby users within a local radius
* Enable hyperlocal community chat rooms
* Provide local feed content
* Support emergency HELP alert functionality

Location data is used only while the app is active or when features requiring location access are enabled by the user.

---

## 2. Account Information

Users may use LocalLink anonymously without providing personal identity information.

Optional account upgrade features may collect:

* Email address
* Password credentials

This information is used only for account recovery and authentication.

---

## 3. Device & Network Information

LocalLink may collect limited network-related information including:

* Wi-Fi SSID
* Wi-Fi BSSID
* Connectivity status

This is used to support nearby network-based matching and connectivity features.

---

# Ephemeral Data & Auto Deletion

LocalLink is designed around temporary interactions.

The following content automatically expires and is permanently deleted after approximately 24 hours:

* Private messages
* Community chat messages
* Feed posts
* Temporary activity data

We do not provide permanent public social profiles or follower systems.

---

# How We Use Information

Collected information is used to:

* Operate nearby discovery systems
* Enable real-time messaging
* Deliver emergency alert functionality
* Improve app stability and performance
* Prevent abuse and moderate harmful content

---

# Content Moderation & Safety

Users may report inappropriate content or abuse.

Reported content may be reviewed by authorized moderators to maintain community safety and platform integrity.

Emergency alert misuse may result in account restrictions or moderation actions.

---

# Third-Party Services

LocalLink uses trusted third-party services including:

* Firebase Authentication
* Cloud Firestore
* Google Play Services

These services may process limited technical information necessary for app functionality.

---

# Data Security

We implement reasonable technical and organizational safeguards to protect user information and maintain platform security.

However, no online platform can guarantee absolute security.

---

# Children's Privacy

LocalLink is not directed toward children under the age required by local digital consent laws.

Users who do not meet the minimum legal age requirement should not use the platform.

---

# Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy periodically.

Updated versions will be published within the application or associated public pages.

---

# Contact Us

For privacy-related concerns or support:

**Email:** [mubashirmuhammed547@gmail.com](mailto:mubashirmuhammed547@gmail.com)

# LocalLink Child Safety Standards & CSAE Policy

**Last Updated:** May 2026

LocalLink is committed to protecting children and preventing child sexual abuse and exploitation (CSAE) on our platform.

We maintain a zero-tolerance policy toward any form of child sexual abuse material, exploitation, grooming, trafficking, or harmful behavior involving minors.

---

# Prohibited Content & Behavior

The following are strictly prohibited on LocalLink:

* Child sexual abuse material (CSAM)
* Sexual exploitation of minors
* Grooming or predatory behavior
* Sexualized conversations involving minors
* Threats, coercion, or exploitation targeting minors
* Sharing or requesting exploitative content involving children

Any violation may result in:

* Immediate account suspension
* Permanent account bans
* Content removal
* Reporting to appropriate legal authorities where required

---

# Reporting & Moderation

Users can report harmful or abusive content directly through moderation tools available within the platform.

Our moderation systems and administrators review reports and take appropriate enforcement actions when necessary.

---

# Safety Measures

LocalLink implements safety-focused systems including:

* Content reporting tools
* Account moderation controls
* Community management systems
* Emergency misuse prevention measures
* Temporary content expiration

---

# Cooperation With Authorities

Where legally required, LocalLink may cooperate with law enforcement agencies and relevant child protection organizations regarding verified CSAE-related violations.

---

# Contact Information

For child safety concerns or abuse reports:

**Email:** [mubashirmuhammed547@gmail.com](mailto:mubashirmuhammed547@gmail.com), all the required safety measures are under development

policies.content:
# Privacy Policy

Last updated: May 29, 2026

Welcome to ExamEase's Privacy Policy page. We are committed to protecting the privacy of our test-takers and educators.

## 1. Data Collection
We collect exam performance analytics and user authentication credentials safely.

## 2. Security
All data is stored securely using industry-standard database encryption techniques.
